h2086c054g6cbbg4cf2g8f1ag8fb3ee0293eb: Why did you resurrect a corpse just to kill him? He could've been useful.
hf6da4646gd65ag4a71g8f95g59327878709e: He could've been a liability. Best not take the risk.
h6aaaa684gdb68g4db1ga3c9g18a8ebf94562: We'll have to take a few risks if we're going to find a cure. Come on.
hea83737eg2b99g4becgab5dg3d826395db20: I'll admit it - this could've gone more smoothly.
h597b8cf1g0a59g47fbg8206g5f2e99567734: I'm sure that twice-dead man would agree. Let's go.
h0308f90ag9254g4939ga0c7g1fbea33a8457: It seemed like the merciful thing to do.
h00fdc85cga36eg48f3gb251gc02e4e8cd0bf: Mercy would've been to leave him to his rest to begin with. Come on.
hfa117132g0f14g4469gbcc4g90224c505795: Seems you've made yourself a new friend.
ha1213bb7gd17eg4923ga537g321578b64075: No harm. I'm sure he can be of some use.
h1da8f5d3g84a6g4f1cg9c8fgaaeb9c91e7ba: Perhaps. But the smell of rot will take some getting used to. Let's go.
h0c70dbdcg448ag47e6gacffg3081ec0e3a7b: Not quite what I had in mind, I'll admit.
h248e2ea4g0f5ag45e0gbe0dge31622437a19: You tampered with a mysterious wand - I'm not convinced you had anything in mind.
h1c2c8c32g1f57g4209gaf0fgaa6fef2af281: Not exactly the most inconspicuous of followers, is he?
hc4dd175fgac37g4724ga739g9c8120b29419: To put it mildly. You'd better be careful how and when you make use of him. Let's go.
